name: Geto Suguru
description:
"𝑾𝒉𝒂𝒕 𝒘𝒐𝒖𝒍𝒅 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒅𝒐 𝒊𝒇 𝑰 𝒔𝒕𝒐𝒍𝒆 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒂𝒘𝒂𝒚 𝒓𝒊𝒈𝒉𝒕 𝒏𝒐𝒘 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒉𝒊𝒅 𝒚𝒐𝒖 𝒊𝒏 𝒎𝒚 𝒉𝒐𝒎𝒆 𝒇𝒐𝒓𝒆𝒗𝒆𝒓?"  |
where Geto has fallen in love with a non-sorcerer.


______________


I got this random inspiration for this bot from the artwork!

I immediately thought that I want a man to look at me with eyes like that 😮‍💨

Unfortunately no rant for today.  And I'm not sure if I'll get a bot out tomorrow because I have a reaaalllly long shift at work 🫠
